owned_dirty_summary: 205FITLARVSEL-002 and 205FITLARVSEL-004 completed and archived in work commit c71fa43d43b56bcb090bf300ba0d4871199e8622. Generic filtered zoneTokenAgg/tokenProp selector-expression support landed with the selector data changes. 205FITLARVSEL-003 remains pending user-confirmed resolution from the 1-3-1 reassessment; 205FITLARVSEL-005 is the next independent target.
